creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to takefu from comment #4)
> The VGA adapter is not correctly recognized under the i386 environment.
Could you elaborate, or perhaps write down the steps how to reproduce* the problem, or test the contemporary Clang, given it was reported over four years ago and things might have changed/improved?

*) https://stackoverflow.com/help/minimal-reproducible-example
